name: Ruins Investigation
description: A powerful undead presence lurks in the Ancient Ruins east of the Obsidian Dungeon. Destroy it and report back.
accept_text: Hendricks unrolls a map and jabs a finger at the ruins. 'Our last scout reported an Ancient Wraith — old Velian spirit, bound to that place for centuries. It's been growing bolder. Put it to rest and you'll have earned your place in this guild.'
complete_text: The ancient threat in the ruins has been vanquished. The Velian spirit is gone.
